sources.name: Energy & Policy Institute
sources.title_parsing: Direct from known titles in HTML
sources.description_extraction: Generic (no job descriptions on page, placeholder text added)
sources.notes: Jobs listed as plain anchor tags on simple HTML page. No API available.

sources.name: Permit Power
sources.description_extraction: Full HTML description available via API
sources.pay_visibility: Hidden ($133,000-$160,000/year mentioned in description but not extracted as structured pay)
sources.notes: CareerPuck API at api.careerpuck.com/v1/public/job-boards/{slug}. Requires Origin + Referer headers.

sources.name: Climate Action Campaign
sources.description_extraction: Full HTML description from RSS feed
sources.pay_visibility: Hidden ($19/hour mentioned in description but not extracted as structured pay)
sources.notes: Trakstar RSS feed at {company}.hire.trakstar.com/jobfeeds/{CompanyName} (case-sensitive). No public JSON API.

infrastructure_changes: Added careerpuck and trakstar to ATS_PROVIDERS in source-utils.js

Added careerpuck and trakstar to SUPPORTED_TYPES in sync-sources.js
Added careerpuck and trakstar to ELIGIBLE_PROVIDERS in sync-targeted-pending-sources.js
Added careerpuck and trakstar ATS patterns to discovery.js
Added careerpuck and trakstar provider detectors to source-discovery-helpers.js
Added careerpuck and trakstar handlers in deriveProviderMetadata()
Added careerpuck and trakstar canonical URLs in canonicalizeSourceUrl()
Created fetchCareerPuckJobsForSource() and careerPuckJobToSchema() in ats-clients.js
Created fetchTrakstarJobsForSource() and trakstarJobToSchema() in ats-clients.js
Created energy-policy-institute custom parser in scrapers/parsers/
Modified sync-custom.js to use scrapeCustomSource when parser field is set
Added 3 new sources to sources.json (total now 187)
